name: Church Street Recreation Center
description: Church Street Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Moorestown, NJ. There are 6 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Dingletown Field
description: Come play pickleball at Dingletown Field in Shamong, NJ! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Evesham Township Recreational Facility (Blue Barn)
description: Come play pickleball at Evesham Township Recreational Facility (Blue Barn) in Marlton, NJ! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights. The court is free.

name: Fairmount Park
description: Fairmount Park is a place to play pickleball in Willingboro, NJ. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Freedom Park
description: Freedom Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Medford, NJ. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Hainesport Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hainesport Municipal Park in Hainesport, NJ! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
hours: Monday 9am Walk beginning April 25, 2022 Meet at the Municipal Park Pavilion Additional Events Mayor's Wellness Campaign Veterans Task Force Sponsors WINTER COAT DRIVE Click above for flyer The Senior Connection November 22, 2025 1pm

name: ISC Mt Laurel
description: Come play pickleball at ISC Mt Laurel in Mount Laurel, NJ! There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Jeff Young Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jeff Young Memorial Park in Moorestown, NJ! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Lifetime Fitness Club
description: Lifetime Fitness Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Laurel Township, NJ. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming.

name: Margaret Donnelly O'Connor Education & Wellness Center
description: Margaret Donnelly O'Connor Education & Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in Mount Laurel, NJ. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Marlton Field House
description: Come play pickleball at Marlton Field House in Marlton, NJ! There are 4 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Moorestown Tennis Club
description: Moorestown Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Moorestown, NJ. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and water.

name: Park Place Park
description: Park Place Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Laurel Township, NJ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Players Courtyard
description: Heated, great lighting, no columns, training center.

name: Players Courtyard Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Players Courtyard Pickleball Club in Moorestown, NJ! There are 13 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons.

name: Riverton Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Riverton Memorial Park in Riverton, NJ! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Willow Turn Pickleball Courts
description: Willow Turn Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Laurel, NJ. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are available.
